strategy: He summons a Conscripted Mander at the end of Rounds 1, 2, and 3 (and after any Mander dies), and can sacrifice Manders to heal 500 each, so do not overkill Manders; pressure Steffan directly.
Trapping him gets you a Weakness, so lean on blades over traps.
Hit with Myth, Life, or Death (he resists Balance 80%).
Avoid banking pips to 5+ slots; that can trigger Mana Burn on you. Blade and burst instead.
cheatNotes: He summons a Conscripted Mander at the end of Round 1 and whenever one is defeated, so expect a steady add.
Another Mander arrives end of Round 2.
And another end of Round 3, so the board fills fast.
He can sacrifice his Manders to heal 500 each when attacked, so killing them just feeds him; focus Steffan.
Trapping him gets you a Weakness, so use blades instead of traps.
He hits the first-position wizard with Sandstorm and a Black Mantle accuracy debuff, so watch fizzles there.
Gaining 5 or more pip slots can trigger Mana Burn on you, so do not over-bank pips.
